full_text:
Liu Xu (Wensheng) 劉許 (文生)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xu (劉許), styledWensheng (文生). Son of Liu Fang. Noted for being talented at writing. Liu Xu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
